category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs South Africa NRCS Letter of Authority, mandatory energy-efficiency labelling, and SANS/IEC safety requirements.

title.en: China-to-South Africa Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入南非：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入南非：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against South African NRCS Letter of Authority (LOA), the compulsory energy-efficiency label under SANS 941, MEPS, SANS IEC 60335-2-24 electrical safety, and R-600a refrigerant requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与南非NRCS许可函（LOA）、SANS 941强制能效标签、MEPS最低能效标准、SANS IEC 60335-2-24电气安全及R-600a制冷剂要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與南非NRCS許可函（LOA）、SANS 941強制能效標籤、MEPS最低能效標準、SANS IEC 60335-2-24電氣安全及R-600a製冷劑要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NRCS assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current South African compulsory specifications (VCs), SANS standards, NRCS Letter of Authority requirements, and energy-efficiency labelling thresholds with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NRCS评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行南非强制规范（VC）、SANS标准、NRCS许可函要求及能效标识门槛值。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NRCS評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行南非強制規範（VC）、SANS標準、NRCS許可函要求及能效標識門檻值。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four major South African compliance gaps: (1) electrical safety re-testing to SANS IEC 60335-2-24 under the NRCS compulsory specification — CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not accepted; (2) a mandatory NRCS Letter of Authority (LOA) must be issued to a South African importer before any unit clears customs — there is no self-declaration route; (3) the compulsory energy-efficiency label under SANS 941 plus minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) — Chinese GB 12021.2 grades and the China Energy Label do not substitute and the appliance must be re-tested and re-labelled to the South African A-to-G scale; and (4) although the grid is 230 V/50 Hz (same 50 Hz as China), the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V, so ratings and markings must be confirmed. R-600a refrigerant is widely accepted but flammability and charge documentation against SANS IEC 60335-2-24 must be verified.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四大南非合规差距：（1）依据NRCS强制规范按SANS IEC 60335-2-24重新进行电气安全检测——CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被接受；（2）任何产品清关前须由南非进口商取得强制性NRCS许可函（LOA）——不存在自我声明途径；（3）SANS 941强制能效标签加最低能效标准（MEPS）——中国GB 12021.2等级和中国能效标识不能替代，器具须按南非A至G评级重新检测和重新贴标；（4）虽然电网为230伏/50赫兹（与中国同为50赫兹），但标称电压不同于中国的220/380伏，故须确认额定值和标识。R-600a制冷剂被广泛接受，但须核实可燃性及充注量文件是否符合SANS IEC 60335-2-24。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四大南非合規差距：（1）依據NRCS強制規範按SANS IEC 60335-2-24重新進行電氣安全檢測——CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被接受；（2）任何產品清關前須由南非進口商取得強制性NRCS許可函（LOA）——不存在自我聲明途徑；（3）SANS 941強制能效標籤加最低能效標準（MEPS）——中國GB 12021.2等級和中國能效標識不能替代，器具須按南非A至G評級重新檢測和重新貼標；（4）雖然電網為230伏/50赫茲（與中國同為50赫茲），但標稱電壓不同於中國的220/380伏，故須確認額定值和標識。R-600a製冷劑被廣泛接受，但須核實可燃性及充注量文件是否符合SANS IEC 60335-2-24。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred. NRCS, SABS, and the South African Department of Mineral Resources and Energy are the canonical sources for compulsory specifications, SANS standards, and energy-efficiency labelling. Local PDFs not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true.
